chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3427 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.15888/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 and 2 3. For order on CMA No.14629/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 18.8.2025 Mr. Asadullah advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. Learned counsel for the petitioner has sought promotion of Assistant (BS- 16) of the office of the Electric Inspector Karachi Region-II against the vacant post of Superintendent (BS-17). At page 39 of the file the working paper has been prepared in this regard. The working paper clearly reveals that when the Departmental Promotion Committee (DPC) is convened, the petitioner would be considered for promotion on the basis of his seniority-cum-fitness as per recruitment rules. Office of the Electric Inspector, Karachi Region-II, is directed to consider the application of the petitioner as and when it next calls a DPC meeting for promotion from BPS-16 to BPS-17 as per their working paper. A copy of this order shall be sent to the office of the Electric Inspector, Karachi Region-II, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
